key_insight: A half-mode CSRR-based substrate integrated waveguide can preserve the propagation behavior of the full uniplanar design while cutting transverse size nearly in half.
engineering_relevance: The design offers a simpler, more compact waveguide topology that could improve manufacturability and integration in microwave and RF systems.
method: Used a finite element method (FEM) eigenmode solver to analyze the waveguide.
Solved an eigenvalue problem to obtain complex propagation constants of supported modes.
Computed dispersion diagrams for the dominant mode with all loss mechanisms included.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports comparative dispersion analysis showing that the half-mode CSRR SIW retains the performance of the existing full CSRR SIW.
watch_item: Results are based on eigenmode simulation, so practical performance still needs validation under fabrication tolerances and real measurement conditions.
paper_title: Eigenmode analysis of a half-mode uniplanar metamaterial-inspired substrate integrated waveguide
